question: What is the approval threshold for internal users to register new suppliers in Coupa for urgent or business-critical situations?
options: Single approval by Procurement
Single approval by Finance

No approval required

options: Manual configuration by Coupa administrators

No support for geographical process deviations

options: Internal users can extend contracts without approval

options: Full auto-translation of all user interface elements
Partial auto-translation of some user interface elements
No auto-translation support
